description: Mock provider artifacts for SDD-D2-01 task_omc_ingest; no live provider calls and no raw transcripts.

rounds.summary: Claude proposes a bounded OMC ingestion lesson candidate chain: external references plus program-memory candidate evidence, limited to the manual debate-loop slice.
Codex attacks overclaim risk: a debate-loop candidate alone cannot complete the full §10.1 OMC demo or confirmed-memory upgrade.

objections.summary: Do not claim full §10.1 OMC demo completion from this loop; it only satisfies the manual §10.4 item 5 evidence slice.

rounds.summary: Gemini source-audits the chain against project definition and invocation reference; source refs must remain references only.

objections.summary: Candidate evidence must preserve source refs instead of embedding original notes or provider long-form text.

provider_artifacts.summary: Bounded OMC ingestion proposal for candidate-only program memory.
Adversarial objection: no majority shortcut and no full OMC demo completion claim.
Source audit requires source/artifact refs only and preserves raw-record boundaries.
